item.dc:creator: airwoman

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1207 (Ewok Celebration)
item.description:
In honor of America's newest and probably least problematic folk hero, here's some memes about them, and anti-capitalism in general. Let us seize the production of Our Bread.
For the record, if anyone wants to make for me a version of this sign in Sumerian Cunaeform to go with the "live, laugh, love" sign I already have in that language, you'd be my hero.
I heard this morning that his backpack contained monopoly money, this is fucking hilarious.
Pippin (and Alvin) tax. Today's message from Pippin: "Good boy! Good boy!"
TOTALLY JUST KIDDING HERE FEDS I LOVE THE BOOT OF CAPITALISM ON MY NECK.
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett

item.title: 56% of an Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
https://www.instagram.com/shiadanni
https://www.instagram.com/bashtheentertainer
That's Imgurian @CocoCapitainePoulet, playing a beautiful piece he wrote himself. You know, as you do. Upvotes go here https://imgur.com/gallery/tune-i-wrote-this-unique-instrument-R9pMGhz and you can listen to the whole thing on his Youtube channel https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=NevvyELGHl4
https://uselessfarm.com --- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag. --- PSA: I've pretty much spent my last two weeks on imgur reporting ad spam and could definitely use some more eyes & downvoting thumbs: https://imgur.com/gallery/constant-vigilance-usersub-constant-vigilance-lFEcRqc
item.dc:creator: ParallelParkingInABurka

item.title: Images of Note: Jenkem Jams
item.description:
mood
PISS WIZARD!
Mood
sup
HELL YEAH
FUCK YOU (pirates roms of out of print video games)
O<
It's the circle of life: Some guy gets called out for being a cunt and they get a Job on GB news.
P E E
Based Moleman?
Ah yes, the two genders. Femboy and war criminal.
*Throws that at a crowd and everyone gets Double Ds*
a baby!
Oh I am a fucking mess
If exploiting the poor for the benefit of the rich is so vital to America then what does that say about America?
OuO
Ragatha eating a borger on the roof
crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch crnch
Amazing fit. Wish it was warm enough here to pull that of today
Violence
m o o s e
HELL YEAH

item.title: Phone-clearing dump 206
item.description:
Please be satire, please be satire , please be satire , please be satire….
Daniel Sloss. Can really recommend his Netflix specials - altho fair warning, apparently recommending it means that I have ‘dark humour’. Protesting that Sloss isn’t that dark didn’t help my case. At all.
Wait he didn’t just spell rapper and leave out a P, diddy?
Have seen some disturbing vids of Diddy and how he talked to barely teenaged Bieber
Electric cooking, published by the society for the rational use of electricity.
